channel.title: Using Frontity within other frameworks
channel.description: I was wondering if anyone has explored using frontity within other frameworks, such as react native and react native for web. Also wondering if a containerized use-case could be achieved. I am working on an adaptive-card-like framework for embedding instant books with actionable content and navigation into existing apps and sites via sdk, and need to create a solution for wordpress. Any thoughts?

item.title: Using Frontity within other frameworks
item.dc:creator: thewizardofwicacy
item.description:
I just read about embedded mode and i think my main question was answered. This is very, very interesting. Great work, everyone.

Read full topic

item.title: Using Frontity within other frameworks
item.dc:creator: thewizardofwicacy
item.description:
I was wondering if anyone has explored using frontity within other frameworks, such as react native and react native for web. Also wondering if a containerized use-case could be achieved. I am working on an adaptive-card-like framework for embedding instant books with actionable content and navigation into existing apps and sites via sdk, and need to create a solution for wordpress. Any thoughts?

Read full topic
